narrative.narrative: After weeks of consolidation, Bitcoin hovers near $64K as market participants remain cautious, echoing the sideways regime in Aug 2024 where a similar F&G index held for over two months before breaking out.
narrative.headline: Bitcoin Holds Steady Amidst Prolonged Consolidation
